# SkillsGem Intelligence (MCP)

> A high-fidelity repository of System Instruction templates and technical skills for AI Agentic workflows.

## Discovery
This site serves as an MCP (Model Context Protocol) context provider. You can access individual skills as raw Markdown for your system instructions.

- [Main AI Skills Index](/llms-full.txt): Detailed list of all 40+ skills with short descriptions.
- [MCP Discovery](/api/mcp): JSON-RPC endpoint for MCP-compatible clients.

## High-Impact Skills
- [Systems Architect](/skills/systems-architect.md): Planning full-stack tech stacks and file trees.
- [Surgical Debugger](/skills/surgical-debugger.md): Minimal diff fixes for breaking bugs.
- [Frontend Engineer](/skills/frontend-engineer.md): Building clean, responsive UI components.
- [Backend Engineer](/skills/backend-engineer.md): Secure API and authentication architecture.
- [Database Architect](/skills/database-architect.md): Normalized schema design (3NF).
- [API Integrator](/skills/api-integrator.md): Connecting Stripe, OAuth, and Third-party services.
- [Rubber Duck](/skills/rubber-duck-debugger.md): Socratic debugging for complex logic loops.

## Deployment Context
- [Cloudflare Hosting](/skills/cloudflare-hosting.md): Guidelines for deploying to Cloudflare Pages/Workers.
- [Hono Framework](/skills/hono-framework.md): Building ultrafast edge APIs.
